Optimization and Constraint Programming

  • Pulp
  • Pyomoo
  • Or tools
  • Picat
  • Hakank, Many examples and implementations
  • Numberjack, but this is perhaps dead.

A search on python constraint programming yields also many useful links to tutorials and documentaion.

Miscelaneous

  • Why airplanes fly There are many `explanations' of why planes fly, and nearly all of them are false, or worse, not even wrong. A number of those are debunked on this site.
